ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Nov-01-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Shustoff (Counsel for the Trustees, Fred Aiello and Elsa Aiello).

After presentation by Mr. Shustoff, the Court waived the statutory accounting requirement but ordered the Trustees to present an annual accounting to the trust beneficiary which need not be filed with the Court. The Court otherwise granted the Petition, signing the Order for same (as modified) in open court

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: None; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen..
